member.name: T:SimPe.Packages.DepSims2Community
member.summary: Zusammenfassung für DepSims2Community.

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.DepSims2Community.components
member.summary: Erforderliche Designervariable.

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.DepSims2Community.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Die verwendeten Ressourcen bereinigen.

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.DepSims2Community.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Erforderliche Methode für die Designerunterstützung. Der Inhalt der Methode darf nicht mit dem Code-Editor geändert werden.

member.name: T:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack
member.summary: Zusammenfassung für SaveSims2CommunityPack.

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack.components
member.summary: Erforderliche Designervariable.

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Die verwendeten Ressourcen bereinigen.

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Erforderliche Methode für die Designerunterstützung. Der Inhalt der Methode darf nicht mit dem Code-Editor geändert werden.

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack.extension
member.summary: true if the communit Extensions should be used

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack.ok
member.summary: true if the File should be saved

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack.Execute(SimPe.Packages.GeneratableFile[],System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Shows the Save Dialog
member.param: all packages that should be initially in the File
true if you want to add the Community Extension, otherwise a normal Sims2Pack File will be generated
member.returns: A list of all packages this File should contain

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack.Execute(SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor[],System.Windows.Forms.SelectionMode)
member.summary: Shows the Load Dialog
member.param: All Descriptors within the S2CP File
member.returns: All the Packages the user has selected

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack.UpdateDepText(SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor)
member.summary: Updates the Link Text for the Dependency Window

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.SaveSims2CommunityPack.Select(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Select a List Item

member.name: T:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack
member.summary: This class contains static Methods you can use to Handle S2CP Files

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.DEFAULT_COMPRESSION_STRENGTH
member.summary: Defines the Default Compression that is used

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.Decompress(System.IO.Stream,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Decompress input writing decompressed data to output stream
member.remarks: Overwritten, because i needed the output stream to Seek to the Beginning

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.Compress(System.IO.Stream,System.IO.Stream,SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.CompressionStrength)
member.summary: Compress input stream sending result to output stream
member.remarks: I had to change the Origial Compression Methode in a way that it woun't close the input stream and that it seeks to the Beginning of it on startup

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.Create(SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a Sims2CommunityPack File
member.param: The Descriptors of the Package to inlcude
true if you want to add the Community Extension, otherwise a normal Sims2Pack File will be generated
member.returns: The MemoryStream containing the S2CP File

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.Create(SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a Sims2CommunityPack File
member.param: List of Descriptors for all Packages to include
true if you want to add the Community Extension, otherwise a normal Sims2Pack File will be generated
member.returns: The MemoryStream containing the S2CP File

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.ParesDependingPackedFile(System.Xml.XmlNode)
member.summary: Parse the Dependency Node in an XML
member.returns: The Descriptor of the DependencyPackage (the package value is NULL)
member.remarks: The Descriptor won't contain the package Data. Yo you have to find the Matching Package by the returned GUID and Name

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.LoadPackage(System.IO.BinaryReader,System.Int32,System.Int32,SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor)
member.summary: Reads a package from the Stream

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.ParesPackedFile(System.IO.BinaryReader,System.Xml.XmlNode,System.Int32)
member.summary: Parse the packedFile Node in an XML
member.param: The source Stream of the S2CP File
The Ofset for the package Data
member.remarks: The GUIDs and the Names of the Descriptors are the ones stored in the XML Data not the ones from the Package. So you have to the Content with the Package.

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.Open(System.String)
member.summary: Opens a Sim2Pack File
member.remarks:
The GUIDs/Names included in the S2CPDescriptor are the ones found in the Xml Description, you need to check them with the GUIDs stored in the packges itself to
the Content

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.Open(System.IO.BinaryReader)
member.summary: Opens a Sim2Pack File
member.remarks:
The GUIDs/Names included in the S2CPDescriptor are the ones found in the Xml Description, you need to check them with the GUIDs stored in the packges itself to
the Content

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.ShowSaveDialog(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Displays a Save Dialog for the S2CP Files
member.param: true if you want to add the Community Extension, otherwise a normal Sims2Pack File will be generated

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.ShowSaveDialog(SimPe.Packages.GeneratableFile,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Displays a Save Dialog for the S2CP Files
member.param: The package that should be added to the S2CP Files (the user can add more!)
true if you want to add the Community Extension, otherwise a normal Sims2Pack File will be generated

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.ShowSaveDialog(SimPe.Packages.GeneratableFile[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Displays a Save Dialog for the S2CP Files
member.param: The packages that should be added to the S2CP Files (the user can add more!)
true if you want to add the Community Extension, otherwise a normal Sims2Pack File will be generated
member.returns: true if the File was saved

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.ShowOpenDialog(System.String,System.Windows.Forms.SelectionMode)
member.summary: Show the Package Selector Dialog for a S2CP File
member.param: The Filename of the S2CP File
member.returns: All Packages that were selected in the Dialog by the User or null if the User Cancled the Dialog

member.name: T:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.CompressionStrength
member.summary: Enumerates the Strength of the Used Compression

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.CompressionStrength.None
member.summary: Don't use any kind of compression

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.CompressionStrength.Fastest
member.summary: Fastest Compression (biggest Size)

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.CompressionStrength.Default
member.summary: Default Compression Strength

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.CompressionStrength.Slowest
member.summary: Slowest compression (smallest File)

member.name: T:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase
member.summary: Basic Descriptor used for Dependency Files

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.#ctor(SimPe.Packages.GeneratableFile)
member.summary: Creates a new Instance

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.GetGlobalGuid(SimPe.Packages.File,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@)
member.summary: Reads the Guid from the Package
member.param: The Package to load the Guid From
Returns the name stored in te package
The List of original Game Guids
member.returns: null if no GUID Data was found, otherwise null

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.optional
member.summary: If this Dependency Optional

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.name
member.summary: Filename of the container Package (can return null)

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.objectversion
member.summary: Description for the File

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.guid
member.summary: The guid for the File or (can return null)

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.package
member.summary: The associated Package

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ToString
member.summary: Retursn a descriptive String for the Object

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.Valid
member.summary: validates the package aginst the stored GUID/Name
member.remarks: If you have loaded a Package from a S2CP File, the GUID and Name Attributes of this Object will contain the values stored in the Describing XML. You can validate those Values against the Data stored in the Package itself with this Method.

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.Optional
member.summary: If this Dependency Optional

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.Name
member.summary: Returns/Sets the Filename of the container Package (can return null)

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ObjectVersion
member.summary: Returns/Sets the Description for the File

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.Guid
member.summary: Returns/Sets the The guid for the File or (can return null)

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.Package
member.summary: Returns/Sets the The associated Package

member.name: T:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ValidationState
member.summary: Possible results of a Validation

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ValidationState.OK
member.summary: The Data is consistent

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ValidationState.CRCMismatch
member.summary: The CRC from the XMl and the actual CRC do not match

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ValidationState.GlobalGUIDMismatch
member.summary: The GlobalGUID from the Xml and the GlobalGUID stored in the package do not match

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ValidationState.NameMismatch
member.summary: The Name from the Xml and the one stored in the package do not match

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ValidationState.AuthorMismatch
member.summary: The Name of teh Author does not match

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ValidationState.GameGuidMismatch
member.summary: The original Guids have changed

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase.ValidationState.UnableToValidate
member.summary: The Data could not be validated

member.name: T:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor
member.summary: Descriptor for a Packed file in the the S2CP

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.#ctor(SimPe.Packages.GeneratableFile,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,SimPe.Packages.Sims2CommunityPack.CompressionStrength,SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptorBase[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new Insttance
member.param: true if this Package should be stored compressed
true, if you wnt to use the Community Extionsins (Will create a textFile in the Package if needed)

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.UpdateGlobalGuid(SimPe.Packages.File,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the S2CP ID File with the cuurrent settings
member.param: The Name for the Package (used if the File is created)
The List of original Game Guids
member.returns: the stored or the new GlobalGUID

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.UpdateGlobalGuid(SimPe.Packages.File,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the S2CP ID File with the cuurrent settings
member.returns: the stored or the new GlobalGUID

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Update
member.summary: Synchronizes the S2CP ID File with the current Settings

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.GetSetGlobalGuid(SimPe.Packages.File,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@,System.String@)
member.summary: Adds theGlobalGUID Data to the package if it is missing and generates a new GUID for it.
member.param: The Name for the Package (used if the File is created)
The List of original Game Guids
member.returns: the stored or the new GlobalGUID
member.remarks: If the GlobalGUID File does exist, the Data from this File will be returned and no new GlobalGUID will be returned

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.dep
member.summary: Returns a list of objects this one depends on

member.summary: Title of the Package

member.summary: Type of the Package

member.summary: Versionnumber of the Game

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.crc
member.summary: Description for the File

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.description
member.summary: Description for the File

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.author
member.summary: Author of the File

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.contact
member.summary: Author of the File

member.name: F:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.compressed
member.summary: File is compressed

member.name: M:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.ToString
member.summary: Retursn a descriptive String for the Object

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Valid
member.summary: validates the package aginst the stored GUID/Name
member.remarks: If you have loaded a Package from a S2CP File, the GUID and Name Attributes of this Object will contain the values stored in the Describing XML. You can validate those Values against the Data stored in the Package itself with this Method.

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Dependency
member.summary: Returns/Sets the list of objects this one depends on

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Title
member.summary: Returns/Sets the Title of the Package

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Type
member.summary: Returns/Sets the Type of the Package

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.GameVersion
member.summary: Returns/Sets the Versionnumber of the Game

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Crc
member.summary: Returns/Sets the Description for the File

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Description
member.summary: Returns/Sets the Description for the File

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Author
member.summary: Returns/Sets the Author of the File

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Contact
member.summary: Returns/Sets the Contact Person of the File

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.GameGuid
member.summary: Returns a Space seperated List of all Guids stored in the Package

member.name: P:SimPe.Packages.S2CPDescriptor.Compressed
member.summary: Returns /Sets wether the File sould be Compressed or Not
member.remarks: After the Description is loaded form a s2cp File, this Property Indicates if the Package was compressed or not
